title: Gram n Dirk
description: Welcome to Gram N Dirk, the universe of coin and danger. Acquire the land and expand your territory. Socialize with the peasants. Build your custom arsenal to dominate the land!
body:
Hello and welcome to our handcrafted Modpack!
This is a bare-bones RPG pack, a mix of fantasy and some light amounts of technology (Light as in no power suits or space age tech.. AE2 is a QOL for us). Please read the server information below the mods list. Our rules and info are not on the tin when you join for some obvious reasons. :)


<details>

_______________________________________________________________________________________________________
Server information:

The pack comes preinstalled with our server, but just in case!

IP: mc.cuffeebizkit.com

Fundamentally, we want to run this server as barebones as possible and allow players to have as much free reign as possible. We will be tailoring some user-generated content for you to find out about the world. But feel free to create your own adventures with each other!

Please take some time to read the few rules and obligations, as this will allow you to feel guilt-free and, uh, free on the server!
Rules:
1. We follow what is called tactical griefing on the server. If you destroy the entire base just to troll the player, This is too much. We want people to build some nice houses and infrastructure. Only take what is valuable and do it with less destruction. (A mutual agreement between parties is fine for mass destruction).
2. Public railways should not be closed. You may rob trains, but do not destroy the trains or tracks they run on.
3. Do not advertise other servers. We're fine with other servers utilizing this modpack; just don't advertise on ours. Thanks.
4. Do not actively exploit; if you find something, report it. We understand some mods don't like playing with others, and it happens. We just want our players to have fun.
5. Use common sense, i.e., disrespectfulness, hateful language, and any sort of bigotry. You know it; you get the gist. Don't do it.

This list will be updated as players find new ways to push buttons. Beep boop.

For any information or reporting, please contact us via Discord!
